\tzpentry{ID5717}{Quantum Density}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5717 introduces Quantum Density as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \rho_\Lambda = \frac{\hbar c}{R_{\text{Hubble}}^4} \times \frac{\Phi_0}{\Phi_{\text{total}}} \sim H_0^2 \approx 6 \times 10^{-10} \text{ J/m}^3 \end{equation}
